member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.AsyncHelper
member.summary:
Provides helper methods for safely executing async operations synchronously in PowerShell binary cmdlet context.
PowerShell 7+ runs cmdlets without a , so blocking on a task here cannot deadlock the way it would in a UI/ASP.NET classic context. We deliberately do not use Task.Run to keep the call on the cmdlet's own thread — this preserves flow (the ambient slot in particular) and avoids an unnecessary thread-pool hop per await.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.AsyncHelper.RunSync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Safely executes an async operation synchronously and returns the result.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.AsyncHelper.RunSync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Safely executes an async operation synchronously (no return value).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.AsyncHelper.RunSync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Safely executes an async operation that accepts a synchronously and returns the result.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.AsyncHelper.RunSync(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Safely executes an async operation that accepts a synchronously (no return value).

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.EncodingCompleter
member.summary: Provides tab-completion for common encoding names used in cmdlet parameters.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.EncodingTransformationAttribute
member.summary: Transforms string encoding names (e.g., "UTF8", "ASCII") into instances. Allows users to pass friendly encoding names instead of [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper
member.summary: Provides retry logic for transient failures in Azure operations. Implements exponential backoff strategy with optional ILogger support.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper._transientClassifiers
member.summary: Pluggable transient exception classifiers. Providers register their own (e.g., Azure RequestFailedException, SSH.NET, FluentFTP).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RegisterTransientClassifier(System.Func{System.Exception,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Registers a provider-specific transient exception classifier. Called by provider assemblies during initialization. Returns an that unregisters the classifier when disposed.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.DefaultMaxRetries
member.summary: Default maximum number of retry attempts.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.DefaultInitialDelayMs
member.summary: Default initial delay between retries (in milliseconds).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.DefaultMaxDelayMs
member.summary: Default maximum delay between retries (in milliseconds).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.ExecuteWithRetryAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Executes an async operation with retry logic for transient failures. Uses exponential backoff strategy.
member.param: Maximum number of total attempts (initial call + retries). Must be >= 1. A value of 1 disables retries — the operation is invoked once and any transient failure surfaces directly.
Initial delay between retries in milliseconds.
Maximum delay between retries in milliseconds.
Optional callback invoked on each retry attempt with diagnostic message.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.ExecuteWithRetryAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Executes an async operation with retry logic (void return).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.IsTransientException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines if an exception is transient and should be retried.
member.returns: True if the exception is transient and can be retried.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Creates a retry policy configuration.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation using this policy.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation using this policy (void return).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy.Default
member.summary: Default retry policy for Azure operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy.Aggressive
member.summary: Aggressive retry policy for critical operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Common.RetryHelper.RetryPolicy.None
member.summary: No retry policy.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.PSDataRepositoryException
member.summary: Base exception for all PSDataRepository-related errors.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.ConnectionException
member.summary: Exception thrown when connection to a repository fails.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.AuthenticationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when authentication or authorization fails.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.TransientException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a repository operation fails due to transient errors (can be retried).

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.SessionNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a session/connection is required but not established.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.UnsupportedProviderOperationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when attempting to perform unsupported operations on a provider.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Exceptions.SerializationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when serialization/deserialization fails.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ConnectContext
member.summary: Concrete implementation of that wraps PowerShell dynamic parameters.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ConnectContext.From(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IAuthenticationInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a from a generic property bag for non-PowerShell callers (e.g. the MCP host or unit tests) where no is available. Keys are matched case-insensitively, mirroring PowerShell parameter binding.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.DynamicParameterBuilder
member.summary: Converts metadata into PowerShell instances for dynamic parameter support.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.DynamicParameterBuilder.AddProviderParameters(System.Management.Automation.RuntimeDefinedParameterDictionary,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Builds a from provider parameter definitions.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader
member.summary: Discovers and loads plugin assemblies from subdirectories next to the module DLL. Scans for , , and implementations.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.SharedAssemblyPrefixes
member.summary: Assembly-name prefixes that are always resolved through the Default load context so that contract types (interfaces) have a single identity across all plugin ALCs. Without this, an IProviderDefinition loaded into a plugin ALC would not be assignable to the same interface type loaded into the host ALC.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.ExpectedPublicKeyToken
member.summary:
Expected public key token for trusted plugin assemblies. Derived from the same SNK used to sign all PSDataRepository assemblies.
If this token is empty (i.e. Core itself is not strong-named), plugin loading is disabled completely — fail-closed. Without a known good token there is no way to distinguish a legitimate plugin from a maliciously dropped DLL in the module folder.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader._trustedTokens
member.summary: Additional public key tokens trusted by the host administrator. Populated from the sidecar extensions.trust.json file (see ) before runs. The Core SNK token is always implicitly trusted; this list extends trust to 3rd-party plugins signed with their own SNK.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.TrustListFileName
member.summary: Name of the optional sidecar JSON file located next to the module manifest that lists additional trusted public key tokens.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.AddTrustedToken(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a public key token to the runtime trust list. Token must be a 16-character lowercase hex string (8 bytes). Duplicates are ignored.
member.returns: true when the token was added, false when invalid or duplicate.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.LoadTrustedTokensFromFile(System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Loads additional trusted public key tokens from {moduleDir}/extensions.trust.json if it exists. Missing or malformed file is treated as "no extra trust" — fail-closed.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.IsTokenTrusted(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Returns true if matches the Core SNK token or any administrator-trusted token.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.LoadAll(PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry,PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationRegistry,PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Scans the module directory for plugin assemblies and registers discovered providers, authentication providers, and formatters. Safe to call multiple times.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.LoadAll(System.String,PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry,PSDataRepository.Authentications.IAuthenticationRegistry,PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Host-friendly overload that scans instead of the directory containing PSDataRepository.Core.dll. All trust-check rules (S-1 strong-name token, S-2 path-containment) still apply against the override. Used by alternative hosts (tests, MCP server) that load Core from a location which does not contain the Auth/, Providers/, Formatters/ subfolders.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.TryReadPublicKeyToken(System.String,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Reads the public key token from a .NET assembly without loading it for execution. Uses + so no static constructors or module initializers in the candidate file are triggered.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.Reload
member.summary: Resets the loaded state and discards all plugin s. Useful in tests or when a full plugin re-scan is desired. Note that the underlying assemblies cannot be unloaded while still referenced; this only clears the loader's own bookkeeping so that LoadAll will rescan and rebuild on next call.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.Reset
member.summary: Resets the loaded state (for testing only).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.EnsureDefaultAlcResolverInstalled(System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Installs (idempotently) a handler on the context that probes for assemblies the runtime cannot otherwise locate. Required because shared third-party libs (Azure.Core, Azure.Identity, ...) are delegated to the Default ALC, but their transitive dependencies in the module root (e.g. System.ClientModel.dll) are not on PowerShell's default probe path.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Extensions.ExtensionLoader.ExtensionLoadContext
member.summary: Per-plugin-folder . Plugin DLLs and their private dependencies are loaded into this context. Shared contract assemblies () are delegated to the Default context so type identity is preserved across boundaries.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Conn_NoActiveSession
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No active PSDataRepository session. Use Connect-PSDataRepository first..

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Err_UnsupportedEncoding
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot convert '{0}' to System.Text.Encoding. Supported values: ASCII, BigEndianUnicode, Latin1, Unicode, UTF7, UTF8, UTF8BOM, UTF8NoBOM, UTF32..

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Prov_UnsupportedOperation
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Provider '{0}' does not support operation '{1}'..

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Retry_MaxAttemptsExceeded
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Operation failed after {0} attempts..

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Resources.Strings.Retry_TransientError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Transient error on attempt {0}/{1}: {2}. Retrying in {3}ms....

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager
member.summary: Abstraction over session management for testability.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether a session is currently active.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager.GetSession
member.summary: Gets the current provider session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager.SetSession(PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession)
member.summary: Sets the active provider session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager.ClearSession
member.summary: Disposes and clears the current session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.ISessionManager.GetRepository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the requested capability from the current session. Returns null if the session doesn't support that capability.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySessionContext
member.summary: Encapsulates a single repository session context. Holds the active and nothing else.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySessionContext.CurrentSession
member.summary: Active provider session (set by ).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySessionContext.IsConnected
member.summary: True when a provider session is active.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySessionContext.Clear
member.summary: Disposes and clears the current session.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySession
member.summary:
Ambient session holder backed by .
AsyncLocal flows across Task.Run / await boundaries via , so the session stays consistent when synchronous PowerShell cmdlets bridge to async repository code via AsyncHelper.RunSync. Each PowerShell runspace / pipeline invocation gets its own execution context and therefore its own session slot — no cross-pipeline bleed.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySession.Current
member.summary: Gets the active provider session, or null.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySession.IsConnected
member.summary: True when a provider session is active.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.RepositorySession.Clear
member.summary: Disposes the current session and clears state.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager
member.summary: Manages the lifecycle of repository sessions. Purely delegates to — knows nothing about concrete providers, Azure SDKs, or authentication.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.Instance
member.summary: Singleton adapter backed by this static class. Enables dependency injection and unit testing.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.SetSession(PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession)
member.summary: Sets (connects) the active session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.ClearSession
member.summary: Disposes and clears the current session.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether a session is active.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.GetSession
member.summary: Gets the current provider session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Core.Session.SessionManager.GetRepository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the requested capability from the current session.
